{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Navigator vessel
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Navigator vessel]] can be held together by hope and [[Intent]] for a limited time.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
